11.title: My Hero Academia

111.content:
Izuku Midoriya like many people wanted to be a hero. Someone who could help others and save them with a smile like his idol All Might.

The thing is most people who want to be a hero are of a average height. Izuku was short, verrrry short. The ankle socks you put on, he's shorter then the hem, the tingling you feel under your foot is probably him when you accidentally stepped on him.

While in another universe Izuku is quirkless and gains a quirk through training, here the boy is born with a quirk. One that makes the people in his life giants. The quirk made Izuku an inch in height and made him super tough.

Despite having a quirk life as a tiny was tough. Izuku had to avoid the feet of giants and deal with the teasing of his childhood friend. Still when he saw the giant figure of All Might on his wall Izuku knew he could become a hero.

Now then, where do we start?
111.title: Izuku The Tiny Hero

choices: Began to take off his shoe
1111.content:
Izuku sighed as he sat on his desk, the board stretching many feet forward and to his sides. He was a mere speck anong the surface of the desk, one needing to look close to spot him. Though in this case he'd rather not be seen preferring not to endure more mocking from his giant classmates-

"Oi Deku.", a voice boomed down as a shadow casted over Izuku. Looking up, the greenette gulped as a familiar site was above. The large smirking face of his bully and childhood friend Bakugou.

"Oh hi Kacchan!", Izuku called up attempting to be calm, taking a breath the tiny attempted to act casual and hooe for the best. "That was a lot of notes hu-AH!"

Izuku was cut off as Bakugou suddenly rose his leg and slammed his white shoed foot down next to Izuku, knocking him back. Bakugou widened his smirk as he leaned down. "Can it nerd! I didn't come to listen about your fuckin day, i came over to this antpile of yours cause i bored as shit."

The greenette felt dread, a bored Bakugou meant he needed something to entertain him and unfortunately that often was Izuku. Bakugou smugly grinned as he planted his foot on the notes Izuku took, crumbling the papers under his white treads. "Your my bug shitty Deku and i wanna feel my bug squirm as i study for U.A."

Izuku took a second to mourn his crushed papers before nervously shaking his hands. "K-kacchan i kinda have plans.", the freckled tiny was vague as he rather not reveal his plans to apply to U.A while the blonde was still looming over.

This didn't seem to be the right thing to say as Bakugou snarled growing a pissed off look. Next thing he knew, Izuku was getting swiped up into the fist of Bakugou, the tiny yelping as the sweaty and firm fingers squeezed him. Bringing his fist up, Bakugou's red orbs glared at the head poking out of his hand.

"I don't give a fuck Deku, you still haven't leaned your fucking place huh!? Why should the next no.1 hero listen to a bug's pathetic squeals!", Bakugou blasted Izuku with his hot breath and booming voice. Bakugou grew a smirk again as he began walking out of class. "I was gonna carry your puny ass home, but i know where to put you now."

Bakugou...
1111.title: Another Day For A Tiny

choices: Until another student from his class steps on him
He makes it to the classroom, excited to meet his peers
1112.content:
Izuku had dreams of becoming a hero like no other. He knew that at his size, he wouldn't be facing off in the heat of battle like his hero, but he would be needed for much more delicate operations. And while it may not be the dream hero work he imagined, the fact that what he would be doing would help in a way no one else could... That was a dream in its own entirety.

So with the thousands of scholarship applications, the one containing the details and description of Izuku Midoriya reached the head offices of the committee of UA. There were arguments, concepts, worries about this one student. This one student, however small he may be, took up more time in that meeting than any other. It was Nezu, the principal, who finally brought the room to silence.

"No matter how big. No matter how small. No matter how odd. Everyone has a way they can be a hero. Izuku Midoriya is special and with the right guidance; he could be the key to have that extra edge. He would need different training than the others, but... If we train him right. He could be exponentially detrimental to the side of evil."

- - -

The tiny boy sat, watching TV quietly on the couch arm. Before a shrill of excitement nearly knocked him off onto the floor. The sight of his mother rushing into the room startled the small green-haired boy. But the words that escaped her lips push any fear away.

"YOU GOT THE SCHOLARSHIP!" His mother shouted, a wide smile brightening her tired face. And while worry still clouded her mind, she knew better than to derail the good news. To which Izuku replied with many times the enthusiasm as his mother.

- - -

The car rolled up to the parking lot and parked quietly, the breeze bringing a welcome chill the rather warm morning. It was a bittersweet goodbye for Izuku's mother, while her joy and excitement ran through her, proud of her young boy. The worry for his safety consumed her mind, shrouding it in a saddened haze. But she would push it aside to support the one she loved.

"Stay safe, and listen to your teachers, and be nice to the other students, and eat your lunch, drink water-" The micro cut the woman off by hugging her nose, as he had been held to her face.

"I love you mum." He stated, an excited smile greeting his lips to which the woman couldn't help but copy.

"I love you too, darling."

And with that, Izuku was placed carefully in front of the gates to the school, the mother being warned she was not to enter and the micro happily darted in. Eyes wide and full of joy as he speeds across the pavement...

Izuku Midoriya hummed as he made his way back to his classroom, he had gone to use the restroom and was ready to head home with his friend. As he reached the class, there was a sudden loud noise and a few of his classmates came running out over dramatically.

The greenette blinked in surprise but felt a lightbulb go off in his head when he saw a burned hole in the fleeing student's shirt. Walking into the class sure enough there was a growling speck on his desk with smoke coming out of his hands.

Bakugou clenched his teeth as his hands were still heated from blasting the giant fucker. Thought it be funny to come by and treat him like a doll, well he had another thing fucking coming! A shadow loomed over and looking up Bakugou saw the looming figure of Izuku worriedly looking down at him.

"Kacchan are you ok?!", the booming voice hit him and nearly knocked him down.

"Oi I'm fine Deku, i told you if any extra besides you tries to touch me their getting their ass blasted!", the blond crossed his arms still peeved.

Izuku worriedly tapped his fingers together. His little friend was pretty mad, how could he calm him down? An idea hit the freckled boy which had him grinning. "Do you wanna climb my feet Kacchan?"

Bakugou smirked as he stretched. "Hell yeah, i gotta train to show those fuckers who's top here!"

Izuku chuckled as he took a seat at the desk, reaching down to his large red shoes. With a grunt Izuku felt the shoe start to slip as it seems his socks adhear to the insoles from how sweaty his feet were and how much the plump soles stomped the sock.

With a POP the foot dislodged from the shoe, soon Izuku began to peel the socks off his plump soles a peeling sound emitted as his sweaty sole was revealed. Izuku flushed as he leaned back and propped both his large soles before his tiny friend.

"S-sorry if the smells strong! I didn't have time to shower and i accidentally wore my used socks....", the freckled boy rubbed his head sheepishly.

Bakugou blinked as he stared up at the towering sole, trails of sweat dripping down. The smell being emitted was another, a chessy foot stench from Izuku's feet baking in his clunky shoes. While he wouldn't say it out loud the ash blond did have a fondness for his friend's feet, the bittersweet cheddar was oddly...alluring.

"Tch whatever i never complained about it before!" , Bakugou yelled trying to cover up the mushy feeling he felt.

Bakugou began to climb up the large foot, starting by probing himself up on the firm heel before trekking up the soft sole, getting a more potent aura of Izuku's rank foot odor.

Izuku giggled at his friend's tiny hands climbing up his plump sole. He often did help the tiny with his training rather it be having him climb his body or squish him somehow. It did make the freckled boy a little embarrassed but he was happy to help.

Soon during his foot climb...

12.title: Fairy Tail

121.content:
Natsu Dragneel was an interesting wizard in the world of Earth Land; Natsu was a dragon slayer, but he only stood at an inch tall.

Natsu didn't know how, but he was born with a strange magical defect. Luckily for the tiny wizard, Natsu was extremely durable and did have some powers to defend himself... although more times than not, his fire was snuffed out by one of his giant guild mates.

The tiny dragon slayer was always being taunted by his fellow wizards, such as Gray stepping on the tiny male or Romeo bragging about how huge his muscles were compared to his tiny friend, giving him an up close tour of them. Often, the giant males would ask Natsu to fight with them, which was nothing more than an excuse to humiliate the tiny, Natsu was always up for the challenge though, even if he knew he couldn't win.

One day, Natsu was making his way across the giant guild hall, across to the job board. Natsu was useful for stealth-related jobs... but a bit lacking on the fighting side.

The ground shook as a dark shadow enveloped his tiny body.

"Hey Natsu, you up for a fight?"

But who was it?
121.title: The Smallest Dragon Slayer

1212.content:
Natsu grinned and slammed his fist into his opened palm. "Let's go!"

Romeo chuckled at Natsu's enthusiasm as the young, muscular boy towered above the fire dragon slayer.

Romeo reached down and grabbed Natsu in his sweaty palm, bringing him up to his muscular chest. "Let's go outside, maybe you'll win this time."

Romeo puffed his chest out and tucked Natsu between the exposed muscles, tauntingly flexing them as he walked outside.

Natsu cringed as he smelled Romeo's odor, his sense of smell was heightened as a dragon slayer, which was particularly bad due to his size.

Romeo gave Natsu one more squeeze before plucking him out of the muscles and sitting him on the ground.

"You ready?" Romeo smirked as he slipped his shoes off.

"You bet!" Natsu roared. "I'll win one of these days!"

122.title: Gray Fullbuster

1222.content:
Natsu and Gray had been forced by Erza to take a mission together. It was a two-person job and as usual they were so afraid of Titania that they agreed instantly. Now the two were walking through a hot, muggy forest and sweating up a storm..which made both boys cranky and itching to snap at each other.

"Are you sure we're going the right way, Flame-Brain?" Gray wiped the sweat from his naked torso. Natsu grit his teeth and yelled back, "Of course I'm sure! Just shut up and put some clothes on Ice Stripper!"

"What'd you call me?!"

"I called you a weirdo ice stripper!"

The two were interrupted by the growling of Natsu's stomach. The awkwardness of the situation caused them to back off and Gray to scoff: "You're hungry at a time like this?"

"S-shut up!" Natsu blushed, on cue Gray's stomach gurgled also. "You're one to talk! I hear that stomach of yours!" Natsu pointed a finger accusingly.

"F-fine! Let's split up for now and go find some food!" Gray blushed and yelled.

"Great idea..for once!" Natsu charged to the right, yelling that he was going to find a pig to roast.

Gray rolled his eyes and of course went the opposite direction. After what seemed like forever he came upon some sort of ancient altar with a heavy bronze idol on top.

"Weird...must be from some old civilization. But I've never heard of anyone living out this way." Gray murmured as he strode up to the strange altar.

The altar was covered in moss and overgrown with vines, it had clearly been there for a long time. Squatting before the ancient thing, he brushed some of the moss and dirt off to reveal letters he'd never seen before.

Words he didn't understand and couldn't read were before his eyes, he scowled. "What is this crap?" Standing back up, he reached towards the idol and picked it up to inspect.

Instantly, the eyes of the small statue glowed and its mouth opened via some mechanism. A mist poured out and surrounded Gray, causing him to cough.

His eyes grew heavy, and he knew no more.

**************

A series of earth shaking booms startled the ice make wizard awake. It was close to midday now, how long had he been out?! "GRAAAAY!" A booming voice that seemed to come from the sky itself rattled his ear drums.

"What the hell?!" Gray covered his ears as the ground quaked once more.

"ICE STRIPPER! PERVERT! GET OUT HERE!" The booming voice demanded, growing closer with each series of earthquakes.

"Wait...those are Natsu's annoying nicknames for me.." Gray finally gained his bearings and looked around. "No..way.."

Everything, from the leaves to the smalles stone was ENORMOUS to him now! Looking up, he saw that damn altar and the idol laying before him, the size of a mountain!

"Did that stupid thing shrink me?!" Gray shrieked before two massive quakes shook his bones and two big feet clad in black sandals were placed on either side of him.

13.title: Fullmetal Alchemist

choices: Alphonse evaded his own certain doom...for now...
Ed's foot comes crashing down!(Survive/death?)(Which foot?)
132.content:
Credit where credit is due. Most of this story is adapted from a Full Metal Alchemist: Brotherhood story of the title:
Inseparable Brothers.
Url: https://www.deviantart.com/darklord665/a...

It had been one year since Father’s defeat. One year since Edward recovered his right arm and Alphonse his entire body. Other than Ed’s now inability to preform alchemy, life was good and returning to normal. The Elric brothers returned to Resembool, they rebuilt their old home, and then…

“So…how’s Al holding up?” asked Winry as she sat across from Edward at the kitchen table of the Rockbell's house. In front of her were various tools and dismantled automail parts that were keeping the blonde so busy she couldn’t spare the moment to look up at the person she was speaking to.

“Pretty good, all things considered.” the former alchemist replied, also neglecting to look up from his work. As Edward sat there, dressed in a pair of black trousers and a sleeveless, black top, he was immersed in the texts of several books at once. On either side of him were stacks of even more tomes. “He says he’s gotten used to it—the whole being tiny thing—but I think he’s just trying to put on a brave face. Being so small someone can pick you up into their hand would unsettle anyone, but he trusts the guys back at Central and I to come up with a solution.”

About three weeks ago, Edward’s brother Alphonse began experiencing an extreme decline in height. It started with just a few inches, then a foot or two, and suddenly Edward came home one day and almost stepped on his younger brother after he had shrunken to the size of a doll!

“And? Have you made any headway?” the young woman inquired while she used a wrench to twist a screw on an automail hand.

“None.” the teenage, blond male answered with a heavy and drawn-out sigh. “We haven’t even been able to figure out what’s caused it. The very fact he’s so small and still alive is scientifically implausible, so it can’t be related to alchemy. Either he’s been poisoned, God’s fucking with us again, or…” Ed scoffed and slammed shut an old book on “magic” and “rituals”. “…it’s some weird voodoo, hocus pocus baloney.”

“Well…at least he stopped shrinking, right?”

“Yeah, he hasn’t shrunken in over a week now.” The golden-eyed man opened up a new book on plants and poisons from foreign countries and began flipping through the pages. “I don’t think he’ll get any smaller, that’s why I left him back at home. The only thing he has to worry about there is the occasional cockroach, and I’ve seen him wrestle a few of them easily!”

The two childhood friends erupted into laughter at the mental image of Alphonse fighting for his life against a gigantic insect. Following this, the duo spent the next several minutes in silence as they both worked on their separate projects. Eventually, Winry looked up and caught Ed pulling at the collar of his shirt. Due to today’s dreadful summer heat, the 17-year-old was sweating bullets and his shirt was practically glued to his skin. Next to the teenager’s arm was an empty glass that once held an abundance of refreshing, cool water, but Ed was so engrossed in his reading that he would rather die in the heat than get up to replenish it. Rolling her eyes, the automail mechanic stood up and grabbed Edward’s glass on her way by. She refilled it for him and placed it back down next to him. Mumbling a thank you, the long-haired youth took the tumbler and brought it to his lips without ever actually checking its contents.

“Ptooie!” The former Fullmetal Alchemist spat out a white haze the moment the pale liquid touched his tongue. Slamming the glass down upon the wooden table, Edward directed his golden eyes up at his friend in a loathing glare. “MILK?! Are you trying to kill me?!”

“So close…” Winry muttered under her breath as she took the glass of cold milk back; disappointment diffused across her face. As she took the milk to the refrigerator so it wouldn’t go bad, she spoke out loud, “Honestly, Ed, milk is good for you! Don’t you wanna be tall?”

“In case you didn’t notice, I’m taller than you! I’ve grown plenty these last couple years without having taken a sip of that repugnant cow piss! It’s probably thanks to your damn automail I wasn’t gro—“

Before the blond could utter anything more, he was quickly silenced with a wrench to the head. As he doubled over and held the back of his head in pain, Winry went on to say, “And what about Al? How tall was he before this whole shrinking business happened?” Edward immediately froze and ceased his resentful grousing. The reaction pleased the blonde female and she continued. “A few inches taller than you, if I recall! If you start drinking milk, you might be able to surprise him when he finally returns to normal!”

“Would you just get off my back?” Ed took his hands off his cranium and rested them on the tabletop as he returned to his books. “I need to focus.”

“Fine.” Winry spat, but instead of returning to her seat, the young engineer grabbed a bag off the kitchen counter and headed for the door. “I need to pick up some things at the market. Try not to cause any trouble while I’m gone, alright?”

“The hell does she think I’m gonna do?” Edward asked himself after the Rockbell had shut the door behind her. With both Pinako and Den out of town, there wasn’t even anyone for him to argue with. A few minutes after he was left alone, the blond genius heard an irritating buzzing by his ear. When he felt something land on his cheek, he instantly slapped it with the lightning-fast reflexes of a martial artist. Taking his hand away from his face, he examined it and spotted the black, flattened remains of a fly staining his palm. As he wiped his hand against his pants he said, “Not even she would get mad at me for killing some bug, right?”

Not long afterwards, the silent and peaceful atmosphere was disturbed by a peculiar scratching noise. The Elric only acknowledged it the second time it occurred when he lifted his eyes from his manuscript and they darted around to find the source. He traced the third instance to the door Winry had left through not long ago. “What is it now?” he grumbled quietly as he slid his chair back, stood up, and made his way to the door just as something scratched at it a fourth time. When he pulled it open, no one entered his sight until he lowered it. There, sitting on the front steps and staring right at him, was a golden cat. The young man recognized it as the same feline that had been spotted around Resembool lately; the one that had taken a liking to his brother.

“What do you want? Get out of here! Shoo!” shouted Ed as he dismissingly waved while sneering down at the stray animal. It refused to budge and simply sat there; staring up at the human with big, green eyes. The crying it made pierced the teen’s ears and made his eyebrow twitch. “Geez. If I give you some milk, will you scram?” Uttering some not-so-nice things about cats, Ed spun around and walked to the white refrigerator.

“Brother! Big brother, I’m down here! Don’t you see me?!” squeaked a voice belonging to none other than Alphonse Elric; the younger of the two Elric brothers. The tiny alchemist stood between Victor’s (that’s the cat) ears and was shouting at his ginormous, towering brother while waving his arms to signal him. His older brother seemed to glare right past him, however, and was soon turning his back to walk away. “No! Ed! Dammit!” It was just as he feared—his brother couldn’t hear him! He couldn’t see him atop Victor’s head either (his golden-blond hair did match the cat’s fur). Seeing no alternative, Al thanked Victor for his assistance and began sliding down his vivid coat to the floor below.

The younger Elric brother had been minding his own business at home, doing his own studying (no one could imagine how much harder it was to turn pages when you were only a few inches tall), when he suddenly started to shrink again! Before he knew it, he was a mere centimeter tall! Worried his shrinking wasn’t over yet, Alphonse climbed up onto Victor and directed the enormous cat to Winry’s house. He had to get Ed’s attention before he got any smaller!

As soon as the itty-bitty teen arrived on flat, solid ground, he made a mad dash for the house’s opened entryway. Al felt like an intruding ant taking advantage of a carelessly unshut door as he crossed over onto the hardwood floor of his childhood friend’s kitchen. Almost immediately, the miniscule blond’s shod feet slapped against moist ground and he caught a whiff of something rank in the air. Pausing and looking around, Alphonse realized he was standing in a vast footprint of fragrant sweat! As he plugged his nose, Ed’s little brother could only imagine how copiously his brother’s foot must be sweating to produce such a track. He did not need to imagine for much longer…

*THOOM* *THOOM* *THOOM*

The wood beneath Alphonse’s feet shook and quaked to alert the smaller Elric that his sibling was on the move again. The young alchemist turned his head to witness his colossal brother turning the corner and begin stomping toward him; both of his feet, one of metal and the other of flesh and blood, creating similar THOOMs as they slapped against the floor. Al felt the air leave his lungs as he craned his neck back and gazed upon the enormous figure of the former State Alchemist. Ed had been a veritable giant ever since he first shrunk, but now…now the teenager of average height seemed to dwarf any building Alphonse had ever seen!

“Brother! Look down!” cried the gnat of a 16-year-old, but Edward’s unobservant eyes of gold never graced the floor beneath him and he kept on marching forward. As the titanic blond was about to close the gap between him and his bug-sized relative...
132.title: Alphonse Elric

choices: Hitch a ride on his brother's foot.
1321.content:
Al made a split-second decision and fled. He managed to throw himself out of the way just before Edward’s bare foot of flesh crashed down where he had been standing; hurtling him through the air in a powerful gust of wind. Lying on his back, the youth peered behind him and took in the factory-sized structure that was his big bro’s sweltering appendage. “T-too close…if I had hesitated for even a second more, I’d be dead right now!” That was the second time his brother had almost stepped on him! It almost made him miss the days he had towered over Ed as a suit of armor.

“Here, hope you choke on it.” Edward said scornfully as he placed a bowl of milk in front of the gold cat. Victor happily meowed and began lapping up the refreshing dairy product. Whether it ever cared about its tiny passenger’s plight or not, the feline completely forgot about everything else save the bowl of creamy deliciousness in front of it. Meanwhile, Alphonse wasn’t going let something trivial like almost getting crushed stop him from getting Edward’s attention. As he approached the giant’s bare stomper, his boyish face cringed as it was subjected to the foul stench plaguing the air. He could see salty dewdrops trickling down the warm skin of his brother’s foot; soaking into the hardwood floor beneath it and polluting the surrounding air with a most unpleasant odor. What’s more, the foot was producing its own heat and Al could feel his face grow hotter and hotter with every step he took. Soon his sibling’s foot was within arm’s reach and Alphonse stared up the length of the trunk-like leg as it stretched up to the heavens...

132132.content:
The long-haired colossus was totally oblivious as he turned around and smashed his little brother under his heavy power…partially because he had not. Tiny, helpless Alphonse had been tucked into the crevice between two of his bulbous toes. There, stuck between his beloved brother’s meaty hallux and neighboring digit, Al could merely squirm and attempt to yell over the earthshattering kabooms generated by the titan’s strides. Ed eventually returned to his seat at the kitchen table, but this didn’t do much to change Al’s dilemma. He remained trapped between Edward’s toes; writhing in the stifling heat and rancid scent of the man’s right foot.

“E-Ed…h-help…! Get me…get me out of here…!” the centimeter-sized male pleaded, but his soft voice couldn’t reach Ed’s ears as the larger boy continued to read. In the several minutes that passed, the sweaty giant occasionally clenched his five toes. What was an absentminded action on his part was torture for Alphonse as the smaller of the two Elrics got his whole body quashed between the mammoth-sized, sweat-soaked digits of a superior male. The young, cute face of the miniaturized prodigy was squeezed into the moist, fleshy wall of Edward’s big toe and Al’s dizzy eyes rolled into the back of his skull with disgust. Just when the former, bodiless boy thought his torment would go on forever, Edward leaned his weight back until he was balancing the chair he sat on upon its two back legs. At the same time, he lifted both feet off the floor and propped them up onto the tabletop...

info.brief_description: Anime guys go through life smaller then usual
info.description:
Hello there welcome to another interactive.

Now then, this interactive is going to be quite different from my other stories. It being because in this story the ones who are tiny are the anime characters themselves. Now you could put yourself into this story tiny as well if you wish to be.

So this interactive is about a anime character being tiny and going throughout their life. Now you could go the classic route where somehow a character mysteriously shrinks.

Or you could do something cool called a Tiny AU ( tiny alternate universe ). This basically is an au where a character is tiny and it's somewhat natural, for instance they may have been born tiny or a incident before their story shrunk them down for a long time.

Example: Izuku could actually have a quirk that made him tiny his whole life.

Something like that. You can have the other characters either be oblivious to the tiny or full aware of their tiny presence.

Now you can put yourself into the story as the one who gets shrunk, though the choices of the characters themselves will be put up first.

Ok onto the rules
- Keep giant content M/M
- The tiny in question can have high durability or some kind of boost while being small.
- Pretty much everything except for piss or scat is allowed
- Keep explicit content to the older characters.
- If you add anything besides a choice chapter, please make it at least 500 words.

Alright, enjoy and enjoy the tiny lives of some anime dudes~
